description: Format the movie scene in the open document 'Raw_Script_Scene.docx' into standard screenplay format using Microsoft Word 2010. The entire document must use Courier New, 12pt font. Set page margins to Top: 1.0", Bottom: 1.0", Left: 1.5", and Right: 1.0". Apply specific indentations for screenplay elements: Character Names at 2.0" Left Indent; Dialogue at 1.0" Left Indent and 1.5" Right Indent; and Parentheticals at 1.5" Left Indent. Scene Headings and Action text should maintain default 0" indentation. Save the formatted file as 'Formatted_Script.docx' in the 'Documents' folder.
